name: aggregator includes all rules in declaration order from a single file
setup:
cat > tree/google/tsguide.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: "Google LLC"
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:abc
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: "Avoid any."
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
  - id: g-ts-002
    name: no-cast
    description: "Justify casts."
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-cast.sh
  - id: g-ts-007
    name: no-empty-types
    description: "No empty types."
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-empty-types.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001, g-ts-002, g-ts-007]
all_set: [g-ts-001, g-ts-002, g-ts-007]
EOF
